// DIVERGED: (language-forced) C++ uses View.Visit() from Input handler. Rust queues
                // navigation via PanelCtx::request_visit, drained by emView each frame.

/// DIVERGED: (language-forced) C++ name is ResetDetails (private). Renamed to
    /// reset_details with pub(crate) visibility for test access.

// DIVERGED: (language-forced) C++ `emAutoplayConfig` is a single class; Rust splits the record data into
// `emAutoplayConfigRec` and the model wrapper into `emAutoplayConfig` (one primary type per file).

// DIVERGED: (language-forced) C++ uses AddWakeUpSignal / IsSignaled. Rust uses Rc<Cell<bool>>
// flags set by on_click callbacks and polled in Cycle.

// DIVERGED: (language-forced) no C++ equivalent — Rust-only resource cleanup (C++ uses destructor)
        /// Remove engine/timer from scheduler. Call before dropping.
